items.name_en: kelly2424 mini 21cm Evercolor/swift, strongly recommended. Young retro vibe, not only beautiful but also easy to handle in various ways (handheld, single shoulder, crossbody, backpack). The backpack strap style is super practical with ample capacity. Khaki
Mon Tresor
Light blue leather mini bag more details
Mon Tresor small bucket bag, featuring drawstring and Fendi metal logo decoration. Equipped with one long and one short detachable shoulder strap, can be carried by hand, over the shoulder, or crossbody. Light blue calfskin material. Black hand-painted embossed FF iconic print pattern. Gold metal hardware. Made in Italy

kl25 colormatic

items.name_cn:
L ⊚ ℮ w ℮ 🌟 🔥 Puzzle small #New Style#
In sync with the boutique 🎉 Made with imported piquet calf leather, featuring a unique cut combined with a plain weave. Its unique grain pattern 👿 Herringbone pattern cotton canvas lining, full steel original factory hardware ⚡️ Adjustable shoulder strap, comfortable touch and super practical volume, simply irresistible, suitable for all ages 😜 💥💥💥 size: 24*16.5*10.5cm Model: 261801
Small (Includes full packaging)

items.name_en: L ⊚ ℮ w ℮ 🌟 New Arrival 🆕 New Colorway Small Soft Calfskin Puzzle Handbag
items.name_cn:
L ⊚ ℮ w ℮ 🌟 New Arrival 🆕 New Colorway Small Soft Calfskin Puzzle Handbag
The first debut handbag from L ⊚ ℮ w ℮ 🆕 *The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines* This small version is made of soft calfskin, featuring overlapping edges. The small Puzzle can hold, for example, a large wallet, all sizes of phones, and sunglasses; it can be carried on the shoulder or crossbody* Handheld or top handle carry* Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap* One internal slip pocket and one external back zip pocket* Zip closure with calfskin pull tab* Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing 🌟
size: 24*10.5*16CM
Model: 062324
(Includes full packaging)

items.name_cn:
L 🌟Patent Standard A4 Tote
Featuring an envelope structure at the bottom, this large version can be carried by the top handle or a removable shoulder strap. Made of patent calfskin, it features a badge embossed on the front and is lined with herringbone cotton fabric.
size:36*28.5*7.5CM
Model:652303
